nasb.text: So King Ahasuerus said to Queen Esther and to Mordecai the Jew, “Behold, I have given the house of Haman to Esther, and him they have hanged on the gallows because he had stretched out his hands against the Jews.

esv.text: Then King Ahasuerus said to Queen Esther and to Mordecai the Jew, “Behold, I have given Esther the house of Haman, and they have hanged him on the gallows, because he intended to lay hands on the Jews.

cnv.text: 亞哈隨魯王對王后以斯帖和猶大人末底改說：“因為哈曼要下手害猶大人，我已經把哈曼的家產賜給了以斯帖，人也把哈曼掛在木架了。

ccb.text: 亚哈随鲁王对以斯帖王后和犹太人末底改说：“我已把哈曼的家产赐给以斯帖，并把他吊在木架上了，因为他想害犹太人。
